name: Pastitsio
recipeIngredient: Grated cheeses (any combination of mizithra, kefalotyri or Romano cheeses)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, boil the ziti in salted water until almost tender. Drain thoroughly.
2. In a large bowl, combine the macaroni, 1 1/2 cups grated cheeses, butter, and 4 beaten eggs.
3. Butter an 11" x 15" x 3" baking pan. Layer half of the macaroni mixture in the pan.
4. Separate 2 eggs and beat them with 1 whole egg. Combine with Saltsa Kima and spread evenly over the macaroni.
5. In a separate bowl, combine Saltsa Aspri, 2 egg yolks, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Pour over the macaroni.
6. Sprinkle remaining cheese and bread crumbs on top.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a golden crust develops and the sauce bubbles.
8. Remove from oven and let stand for 15 minutes before cutting into squares.
9. Serve on a warm platter.
Note: For an elegant pastitsio, try using 1 1/2 pounds of ziti. This is a rich recipe; you can reduce the meat sauce and Saltsa Aspri by one cup if desired.
